notes: SHIP v1.14.341 - device fix pass #2 (owner re-verify of .340). All redesign-scoped (body.rd / #pg-cmd) -> ?legacy byte-identical. FIX 4 (bottom clipping, GLOBAL per owner - still hit on BUILD: the rack-detail phase strip #ph-dock cut off behind the nav): root cause = #ph-dock is position:fixed bottom:var(--tabnav-h) (72) but the .339 icon bump made #rd-botnav ~90px, so the dock's bottom overlapped behind it (dock z:30 < nav z:40). Introduced ONE shared clearance var --rd-navclear:calc(96px + var(--safe-bottom)) on body.rd (the real nav footprint; --tabnav-h can't change - legacy pages consume it). Applied as ONE shared rule `body.rd .page{padding-bottom:calc(var(--rd-navclear)+20px)}` for EVERY scrollable redesign page (Home/BUILD/TOOLS/all) and re-anchored #ph-dock to bottom:var(--rd-navclear) so it sits ABOVE the nav. Removed the per-page #pg-cmd padding-bottom override (the shared rule owns it now); desktop grid bottom padding -> calc(var(--rd-navclear)+20). FIX 3 (ghost co-star): .cc-asst restructured - the ghost is now float:right at 122px (98->122, +25%, owner 'co-star not corner decoration'); the eyebrow (now a flowing block, inline online-dot) + greeting + summary wrap BESIDE and UNDER it (owner: 'let text wrap under the ghost rather than shrinking it'). Floating actually makes the card MORE compact (text beside the art, not stacked below) -> stays within the fold. clearfix ::after contains the float (no overflow:hidden -> glow uncropped). Markup: removed .cc-asst-top flex wrapper; ghost 86x98 -> 107x122 (portrait 0.880, art-law). (.340 fixes 1/OPEN-BAY-clip + 2/back-to-Home stand; owner didn't re-flag them.) Gates: inline-JS vm.Script x3 (no JS logic changed - CSS/markup only), CSS brace net-0, sw.js ok, version.json valid, three-stamp .340->.341; phantom-ship-gate + phantom-rd-reviewer pre-commit. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD-REFRESH / clear SW first): scroll Home / BUILD / TOOLS to the ABSOLUTE bottom - nothing hidden behind the nav (incl. the BUILD rack-detail phase strip, which now sits above the nav); assistant ghost reads as the card's co-star (big, breathing room) with text wrapping under it, card still within the fold. ?legacy=1 pixel-identical. NEXT = .342 desktop top-nav. ROLLBACK: revert this commit.
